evals.name: writing-article
evals.prompt: 帮我写一篇关于时间管理的公众号文章，目标读者是上班族
evals.expected_output: 生成一个完整的公众号文章提示词，包含角色定位、目标读者、痛点分析、文章结构等要素

assertions.name: contains_role
assertions.description: Output should contain a role definition (角色定位)

assertions.name: contains_target_audience
assertions.description: Output should identify target audience (目标读者)

assertions.name: contains_structure
assertions.description: Output should include article structure (文章结构)

evals.name: image-generation
evals.prompt: 我想生成一张职业女性头像，要专业的感觉
evals.expected_output: 生成一个用于Midjourney或DALL-E的图像生成提示词，包含人物描述、风格、光线、比例等参数

assertions.name: contains_subject
assertions.description: Output should describe the main subject

assertions.name: contains_aspect_ratio
assertions.description: Output should include aspect ratio parameter

evals.name: coding-script
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个Python脚本，批量重命名文件
evals.expected_output: 生成一个编程类提示词，包含语言、功能需求、输入输出、代码风格等要求
